name: lab_result_api
description: SimpleAPI endpoint that returns a Canvas lab report with its patient, originating lab order (when linked, including ordering provider, lab partner, and reason conditions), and the report's result tests with nested lab values. Legacy values attached to the report without an associated test are surfaced under unassigned_values.

protocols.description: GET /lab-result/<lab_report_id> - Returns the lab report with patient, lab_order (when linked) including ordering provider and reason_conditions, lab_facility, and lab_result with tests (each containing nested values) and unassigned_values
